suite: Add New Course with Past Date (PBT-1859)

title: Lesson Allocation – Add Associated Course – Past Effective Date ≥ Product Start Date – New Course LA Created
description: AC 03.1, AC 03.3 — BVA / Happy Path — Validates that adding a new associated course via an update order with a past effective date (≥ product start date) creates a new LA with start date = effective date, and leaves the existing LA unchanged.
preconditions:
* User has a student with an active enrolled location
* User has created a product offering (package type = Schedule) with Course A added; Require Allocation flag = True
* User has submitted an order for the student with product start date = 2026-01-01; Course A LA exists with start date = 2026-01-01
* User has added Course B to the product offering (Require Allocation = True)
* Current date = 2026-04-02
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "New Order Group" button
2. Select the student's location and save
3. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" button → Select the existing product → Click "Update"
4. Click "Add Course" → Select Course B → Enter effective date = 2026-01-10
5. Assign a class for Course B
6. Click "Save Draft"
7. Click "Submit"
8. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation list
9. Check existing Course A LA
10. Check new Course B LA teaching method
11. Check new Course B LA total session count
steps_result:
1. New Order Group dialog opens
2. Order Group is created
3. Update order form opens showing current product
4. Course B row added with effective date field showing 2026-01-10; no inline error
5. Class assignment saved
6. Order saved as draft with no error message
7. Order submitted successfully
8. New LA for Course B is visible in the list with start date = 2026-01-10
9. Course A LA still exists with original start date = 2026-01-01 and original end date unchanged
10. Teaching method on Course B LA = teaching method of Course B's course offering's course master
11. Total session count = 0; no student session auto-created
steps_data:
""
"Student's active enrolled location"
""
"Effective date: 2026-01-10"
"Valid class for Course B"
""
""
""
""
""
""

title: Lesson Allocation – Add Associated Course – Past Effective Date = Product Start Date – Boundary Allowed
description: AC 03.2, AC 03.3 — BVA Boundary — Validates that effective date exactly equal to the product start date is accepted (lower boundary of allowed range).
preconditions:
* User has a student with an active enrolled location
* User has a product offering (package type = Frequency) with Course A; submitted order with product start date = 2026-01-01; Course A LA exists
* User has added Course B to the product offering (Require Allocation = True)
* Current date = 2026-04-02
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "New Order Group" → Select location → Save
2. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" → Select product → Click "Update"
3. Click "Add Course" → Select Course B → Enter effective date = 2026-01-01 (= product start date)
4. Click "Save Draft"
5. Click "Submit"
6. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation list
steps_result:
1. Order Group created
2. Update order form opens
3. Course B row added with effective date = 2026-01-01; no inline error displayed
4. Order saved as draft with no error
5. Order submitted successfully
6. New LA for Course B visible with start date = 2026-01-01

title: Lesson Allocation – Add Associated Course – Past Effective Date < Product Start Date – Order Submission Blocked
description: AC 03.2 — Negative Testing — Validates that effective date earlier than the product start date is rejected with the correct EN and JP error messages, and the order cannot be saved or submitted.
preconditions:
* User has a student with an active enrolled location
* User has a product offering with Course A; submitted order with product start date = 2026-01-01; Course A LA exists
* User has added Course B to the product offering (Require Allocation = True)
* Current date = 2026-04-02
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Click "New Order Group" → Select location → Save
2. At Order Group Product, click "Manage" → Select product → Click "Update"
3. Click "Add Course" → Select Course B → Enter effective date = 2025-12-01 (< product start date 2026-01-01)
4. Click "Save Draft"
5. Click "Submit" (if accessible)
6. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation list
steps_result:
1. Order Group created
2. Update order form opens
3. Effective date entered
4. Order cannot be saved; inline error displayed: "The selected effective date is earlier than the product start date." (EN); "選択された適用開始日は、商品の開始日以降の日付を選択してください。" (JP)
5. Submission blocked; same error persists
6. No new LA created for Course B

title: Lesson Allocation – Void Update Order That Added New Course with Past Effective Date – Added Course LA Deleted, Original Unchanged
description: AC 07.6 — State Transition Testing — Validates that voiding an update order which added a new course using a past effective date deletes only the newly added course LA, and leaves the original course LA intact.
preconditions:
* User has completed the scenario from TC "Add Associated Course – Past Effective Date ≥ Product Start Date"
* Course A LA exists: start date = 2026-01-01
* Course B LA exists: start date = 2026-01-10 (created via past-date update order)
* The update order adding Course B is in "Submitted" status and visible in the billing tab
steps_actions:
1. Go to Student Detail → Billing tab
2. Open the update order group that added Course B with effective date = 2026-01-10
3. Click "Void" on the update order
4. Confirm void action
5. Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Lesson Allocation list
6. Check Course A LA
7. Check total session count on Course A LA
steps_result:
1. Billing tab shows the list of order groups including the update order that added Course B
2. Order group detail opens showing the submitted update order
3. Void confirmation dialog appears
4. Order status changes to "Voided"
5. Course B LA is removed from the list
6. Course A LA still exists with original start date = 2026-01-01 and original end date unchanged
7. Total session count on Course A LA is unchanged from before the void
